overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character and their small companion walking across a desert salt flat at sunset. The character approaches a settlement with a crashed starship, passes through the sandy streets, and navigates narrow alleyways with adobe buildings and a tall watchtower.

scene_state.functional_zone: open salt flat desert approaching settlement

events.description: on-screen text appears: 'Planet Toshara Great Chott Salt Flat'
small droid robot appears walking on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the cracked salt flat toward the distant settlement with a small companion creature following behind

notable_agents.action: small boxy droid walking slowly across the salt flat from left to right

entered.detail: massive derelict spaceship with blue and white hull plating resting on the salt flat
cluster of sand-colored adobe buildings with domed roofs on the horizon
cracked dry earth and sand stretching across the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a vast open salt flat during golden hour, approaching a distant desert settlement. A massive crashed starship looms on the left while a small droid crosses the path ahead. The terrain is cracked earth and sand with no vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert outpost main street with crashed ship

events.description: entering the built settlement area from the open salt flat, buildings now flank the path
character turns slightly right to navigate around the crashed starship wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement streets passing by the crashed starship wreckage on the left

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with wooden scaffolding and a large circular structure near the top
sand-colored structures with domed roofs and weathered walls
small cylindrical device with conical top sitting on the ground near the ship

segments.scene_description: The character enters the settlement proper, walking past the massive crashed starship now on the left. Adobe buildings with domed roofs line the right side while a tall watchtower rises ahead. The ground remains sandy as the path narrows between structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with tower and stone archway

events.description: character walks directly past the tall watchtower, looking up at the structure
entering a narrow covered alleyway with overhead cables and stone arch bridges

agents.ego_description: walking past the watchtower and continuing through narrow alleyways with the companion following closely

entered.detail: stone arch structure connecting two buildings overhead with weathered beige walls
thick red and black cables strung between buildings spanning the alley

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the tall watchtower, entering a narrow alleyway with overhead stone arches and cables. The buildings close in creating a more enclosed space, with the sandy path winding between adobe walls toward a distant archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, open salt flat into the increasingly enclosed architecture of a desert settlement. It begins with the character traversing cracked earth and sand under a golden hour sky, moving toward a distant outpost as a massive crashed starship looms to the left and a small droid crosses the path. As the character enters the settlement, the open terrain shifts into a sandy street lined with domed adobe buildings, with the starship remaining a presence on the left while a tall watchtower rises ahead. The scene then narrows as the camera passes the tower and enters a confined alleyway, where overhead stone arches and cables replace the open sky. Finally, the path winds between high adobe walls, leading the character deeper into the enclosed space toward a distant archway.
